prompt: A photorealistic close-up portrait of a small tabby kitten styled like an early-2000s pop-punk rocker, sitting on a dark floor and facing the camera with a calm, slightly soulful expression. The kitten has large round eyes, soft striped fur, and long straight scene-kid hair in platinum blonde with a bold pink streak draped over one side of the face, partially covering one eye. It wears 4 visible fashion elements: a black band-style shirt with a distressed white graphic, a black-and-pink diagonal striped necktie, a black studded bracelet on one front paw, and the dramatic long wig-like hairstyle. The background is a gritty bedroom or rehearsal-space wall covered with punk posters and distressed textures; on the left is a black poster with large white text reading AVRIL LAVIGNE above a pink heart-and-crossbones symbol, and on the right is a blurred poster of a person in dark clothing with a striped tie. Moody warm indoor lighting, shallow depth of field, highly detailed fur, realistic whiskers, subtle grunge atmosphere, centered composition, nostalgic emo aesthetic, studio-quality realism.
